name: Tyler Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugars and cornstarch in a bowl.
2. Gradually add milk and cook until thickened slightly.
3. Stir in butter and egg yolks, then bring to a gentle boil.
4. Turn off the heat and gradually fold in beaten egg whites.
5. Add vanilla and nutmeg, stirring gently.
6. Pour the mixture into an unbaked pie shell.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until firm and brown, about 30-35 minutes.
